title: ‘Closure,’ About a Father’s Obsessive Search for His Missing Son, Wins the Golden Alexander at Thessaloniki Documentary Festival
summary: Polish filmmaker Michał Marczak’s “Closure,” which follows a father’s obsessive search for his vanished son and its devastating aftermath, won the Golden Alexander at the Thessaloniki Intl. Documentary Festival on Sunday. An International Competition jury comprised of film editor Dana Bunescu, cura…
